name: FCNSY Output Trajectory at One Time Unit
description: Theorem establishing that for Z = FCNSY(F, 1), the output at t + 1 is F(f(t)).

elements.text: If Z = FCNSY(F, 1) and (f, x, t) ∈ EXZ, then OTZ(f, x)(t + 1) = F(f(t)).
The assertion holds for arbitrary t by applying the Time Invariance Theorem (Theorem 2.46).
